summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RepNet Landing Page V2 upgrade. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly including new V2 features: typing animations, scroll progress bar, interactive product showcase, pricing toggle, and social proof counter.
passed_tests: Backend - All 4 API endpoints (GET /api/, POST /api/waitlist, POST /api/contact, GET /api/waitlist/count)
Frontend - Page loads without errors, all sections render
Header scroll progress bar appears and moves with scroll
Header active section indicator highlights correct nav item
Hero typing animation cycling through query examples
Hero floating demo card with gradient chart bars
Features section: 4 feature cards with interactive previews
Product Showcase: All 4 tabs (query, table, chart, dashboard) with animated transitions
Why RepNet section: 6 benefit cards with stats (95%, $2K+, Any User, 100%, 24/7, 4+ ERPs)
Pricing: Monthly/Yearly toggle changes Pro price from $299 to $249
Pricing: 3 cards render (Starter, Pro highlighted, Enterprise)
Waitlist form: E2E functionality with success state and social proof counter
Contact form: E2E functionality with success state
Footer renders with 4 social links and 12 navigation links
Mobile responsive: hamburger menu works correctly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (7/7 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (17/17 tests passed)
